title: Spicy Vietnamese Ginger Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry made with the bold spices of Vietnam, featuring fresh ginger and a spicy kick.
instructions: Heat the peanut oil in a wok or large skillet over high heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds, until fragrant.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and snow peas, and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the vegetables start to soften.
Add the ginger paste, soy sauce, and hoisin sauce, and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with sesame seeds if desired.
